canonical_fol: (Play(homesick) & WrittenBy(homesick, deborahWallace) & Play(psyche) & WrittenBy(psyche, deborahWallace) & Play(theVoid) & WrittenBy(theVoid, deborahWallace))

gold_fol: ∀x ∃y (Band(x) ∧ From(x, france) ∧ Write(x, y) ∧ Song(y) → InFrench(y) ⊕ InEnglish(y))
canonical_fol: all x.(exists y.(((Band(x) & From(x, france) & Write(x, y) & Song(y)) -> ((InFrench(y) & -(InEnglish(y))) | (-(InFrench(y)) & InEnglish(y))))))
